name: blackraptor-marketing
description: BlackRaptor Agents — Marketing Team: a governed, full-stack marketing department for Claude Code. 15 world-class specialist agents + 9 skills, hub-and-spoke around a shared Marketing Intelligence Core, with a compliance-gated claims engine and hard human-approval rules on every send, post, and dollar. Also listed in the main blackraptor-ai marketplace (BlackRaptorAI/BlackRaptor_Agents), where installing it auto-pulls the blackraptor-bridge research-rigor plugin.

plugins.name: blackraptor-marketing
plugins.description: Full-stack marketing department: brand-architect, market-research-analyst, copywriter, creative-director, content-strategist, seo-geo-engineer, paid-media-manager, social-community-manager, email-outbound-sequencer, video-creative-producer, competitive-intel-analyst, pricing-strategy-analyst, analytics-attribution-engineer, name-trademark-researcher, and the marketing-coordinator orchestrator — plus 9 skills including the compliance-claims-gate, market-research and experimentation methodology, name/trademark research, pricing/WTP modeling, content craft standards, and the excellence-pass quality discipline. Depends on blackraptor-bridge (evidence-auditor + research-integrity + product-manager) for heavy-tier research validation. No autonomous sends, posts, or spend — agents draft, humans approve.
